candidates.title: Confirm Department Manager export scope
candidates.titleZh: 确认部门主管导出范围

proposal.question: Can Department Managers export all department records, or only records assigned to them?
proposal.questionZh: 部门主管可以导出整个部门记录，还是只能导出分配给自己的记录？

candidates.rationale: Export permissions are high-risk and not fully specified in the input materials.

candidates.title: Confirm cross-department visibility

proposal.question: Can Department Managers view records outside their own department?
proposal.questionZh: 部门主管是否可以查看本部门以外的记录？

candidates.rationale: The role notes explicitly leave cross-department access unclear.

candidates.title: Confirm who approves reviewed records
candidates.titleZh: 确认谁可以批准已复核记录

proposal.question: After a record is reviewed, which role can approve it as final?
proposal.questionZh: 评估记录复核后，由哪个角色批准为最终状态？

candidates.rationale: Approval authority appears in actions and workflow notes, but the responsible role is unresolved.

candidates.title: Confirm whether submitted records can be edited
candidates.titleZh: 确认已提交记录是否可编辑

proposal.question: Can a submitted record be edited before review starts?
proposal.questionZh: 记录提交后、审核开始前是否仍可编辑？

candidates.rationale: Visible edit actions and workflow notes do not establish the transition guard.

candidates.title: Employee records should be deactivated rather than deleted
candidates.titleZh: 员工记录应停用而不是删除

proposal.assumption: Employee records are retained and deactivated instead of physically deleted.
proposal.assumptionZh: 员工记录应保留并通过停用状态处理，而不是物理删除。

candidates.rationale: The visible action is deactivate and the CSV includes active/inactive states, but retention policy still requires review.

candidates.title: Risk level may be calculated from score
candidates.titleZh: 风险等级可能由评分计算

proposal.assumption: Risk level may be derived from evaluation score thresholds.
proposal.assumptionZh: 风险等级可能根据评估分数阈值计算。

candidates.rationale: Score and risk level appear together, but the calculation rule is not specified.

candidates.title: Audit log preserves submit/review/approve/reject/edit actor
candidates.titleZh: 操作日志保留提交/复核/批准/退回/编辑的操作人

proposal.acceptanceCriterion: The audit log records the actor, timestamp, action, and related record for submit, review, approve, reject, and edit actions.
proposal.acceptanceCriterionZh: 操作日志记录提交、复核、批准、退回和编辑动作的操作人、时间、动作和关联记录。

candidates.rationale: Auditability is explicitly required and the detail page includes operation log signals.

candidates.title: Reviewed and approved status semantics may conflict
candidates.titleZh: 已复核和已批准状态语义可能冲突

proposal.conflict: Status labels include reviewed/approved, but notes say approval may be unclear.
proposal.conflictZh: 状态标签包含已复核/已批准，但业务说明中批准规则仍不清楚。

candidates.rationale: The workflow contains both state labels and unresolved authority questions, so it should remain a conflict candidate.

candidates.title: Preserve permission and workflow uncertainty in bilingual summaries
candidates.titleZh: 在双语摘要中保留权限和流程不确定性

proposal.summaryPatch: Summaries should explicitly mention unresolved export scope, approval authority, and edit-after-submit rules.
proposal.summaryPatchZh: 摘要应明确说明导出范围、批准权限和提交后编辑规则仍待确认。

candidates.rationale: The bilingual summary should not translate unresolved risks into confirmed statements.

candidates.title: Keep buildability status review-required until permission and workflow gaps are resolved
candidates.titleZh: 权限和流程缺口解决前保持可构建状态为需审查

dimensionHints.permissionClarity: Do not raise while export and cross-department scope are unresolved.
dimensionHints.workflowClarity: Do not raise while approval authority and edit-after-submit rules are unresolved.

candidates.rationale: Readiness should remain conservative while high-risk permission and workflow questions remain open.
